Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0B1B "EVERYONESAWALLY-C000-0B1B" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $c000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Everyone's a Wally.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $C000 to display the loading screen and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
Before starting the game, the routine sets $4385 to $01 to default to joystick control.
Also made the following changes to allow the joystick button in port two to start the game as well as the space bar:
1. Patched the LDA $4489 instruction at $43DA to be JSR $07D0 instead 2. Added a small routine at $07D0 to check the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then it sets the accumlator to zero and returns, which starts the game. If not pressed, the routine then executes the LDA $4489 instruction and returns to carry on the normal code flow. 3. Updated the message at $1342 to reflect the fact that both space or fire can be used to start the game
